name: Fitted Fairways
address: 1624 Frederica Rd Unit 5A, St Simons Island, GA 31522
about: Fitted Fairways is a PGA indoor golf facility with locations in St. Simons Island, Georgia, and Jacksonville, Florida. They offer a comprehensive suite of golf improvement services, including custom club fittings, professional lessons, and state-of-the-art simulator training and play for golfers of all skill levels. The facility uses innovative technology, including tour-level launch monitors, to provide detailed practice sessions, AI-driven lessons, and data-driven club fittings in a climate-controlled environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading launch monitors provide tour-level precision and detailed analytics
Membership model includes free fittings and predictable monthly costs for frequent players
Data-driven club fitting uses premium and boutique components not found at big-box stores
Over 1,500 virtual courses available for play, including prestigious venues like Augusta National

food_and_drink.notes: No information about on-site food service provided.
No information about on-site alcohol service provided.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Rental clubs are available as an add-on service. The facility also offers custom club fitting services if you're looking to purchase your own set.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information about a BYOB policy or outside food is mentioned. The venue does not appear to have an on-site kitchen or bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For players around a 10 handicap, 18 holes take approximately 45 minutes for a single, 1 hour 30 minutes for a twosome, 2 hours for a threesome, and 2 hours 30 minutes for a foursome.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information regarding junior programs, equipment, or family-oriented activities is provided. The facility does offer lessons for golfers of all skill levels.
